# PERF-83 positive: rows.MapScan inside a for rows.Next() loop
lang: go
file: PERF-083-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "database/sql"

func ListRows(db *sql.DB) ([]map[string]interface{}, error) {
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT id, email FROM users")
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	var out []map[string]interface{}
	for rows.Next() {
		m := make(map[string]interface{})
		if err := rows.MapScan(mapToAny(m)); err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		out = append(out, m)
	}
	return out, nil
}

func mapToAny(m map[string]interface{}) []interface{} {
	out := make([]interface{}, 0, len(m))
	for _, v := range m {
		out = append(out, v)
	}
	return out
}
